name: real-returns-1979-1981
description: High-inflation period (CPI +27.26% over 2 years), portfolio +29.96% nominal total return. Real total return ≈ +2.12%. Catches deflation sign errors.

expected._note: Engine: computeRealReturn(29.96, range, cpi). Hand-check: (1.2996 / 1.2726) − 1 = 0.0212 = 2.12% over 2 years.
